sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ أَحْمَدُ لُغَةَ الْبَرْمَجَةِ لِيَبْنِيَ مَوْقِعًا لِشَرِكَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je naučio programski jezik kako bi izgradio web stranicu za svoju firmu.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed learned a programming language to build a website for his company.

sentences.arabic: كَتَبَ الْأَكْوَادَ بِدِقَّةٍ وَقَامَ بِتَصْمِيمِ صَفَحَاتٍ جَمِيلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Precizno je napisao kodove i dizajnirao lijepe stranice.
sentences.translationEn: He wrote the codes accurately and designed beautiful pages.

sentences.arabic: الْآنَ يَزُورُ الْكَثِيرُ مِنَ النَّاسِ مَوْقِعَهُ لِشِرَاءِ الْمُنْتَجَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Sada mnogo ljudi posjećuje njegovu stranicu kako bi kupili proizvode.
sentences.translationEn: Now, many people visit his website to buy products.
